general_tips: Use large, bold text with high contrast against the background
Include a face with an exaggerated expression when possible
Use no more than 3-5 words of text on the thumbnail
Use bright, saturated colors - especially yellow, red, and orange
Create a curiosity gap - make viewers NEED to click
Ensure the thumbnail is readable at mobile size (small)
Use the rule of thirds for composition
Add a subtle border or outline to make it stand out in search results
Avoid clutter - one clear focal point
Test at 1280x720 but ensure it looks good at 168x94 (mobile)

face_guidelines.eye_contact: direct eye contact with viewer increases CTR

composition_rules.background: simple or blurred to not compete with subject
composition_rules.depth: use size contrast to create depth
composition_rules.direction: elements should guide eye to center or text

a_b_testing_tips: Test one variable at a time
Run tests for at least 24 hours
Test: bright vs dark color scheme
Test: close-up face vs full scene
common_mistakes: Too much text - thumbnail is not a title card
Low contrast text that disappears at small sizes
Cluttered composition with no clear focal point
Using the same frame as the video without enhancement
Misleading thumbnails that don't match content (hurts retention)

text_readability.10: Text is instantly readable at any size, perfect contrast and font choice
text_readability.7: Text is readable but could be optimized for smaller sizes
text_readability.5: Text exists but struggles at mobile sizes
text_readability.3: Text is hard to read, poor font or color choice
text_readability.1: Text is illegible or absent when needed

color_contrast.10: Vibrant, eye-catching colors that pop in any feed
color_contrast.7: Good colors but could be more saturated or contrasting
color_contrast.5: Average color usage, doesn't stand out

face_detection.10: Clear, expressive face at optimal size with great eye contact
face_detection.7: Face present with good expression but could be larger/clearer
face_detection.5: Face present but neutral expression or too small
face_detection.3: Face barely visible or awkwardly cropped
face_detection.1: No face when one would significantly help

emotional_impact.10: Immediately evokes strong emotion and curiosity
emotional_impact.7: Creates interest but doesn't demand attention
emotional_impact.3: Generic, doesn't evoke any particular emotion

click_worthiness.10: Impossible to not click - perfect curiosity gap and visual appeal
click_worthiness.7: Would likely get clicked by target audience
click_worthiness.5: Might get clicked if nothing better is around
